# Abdullah V. Coskun — AI-Native Full-Stack Developer

## Identity
- Name: Abdullah Veysel Coskun (Turkish: Abdullah Veysel Çoşkun)
- Role: Independent AI-Native Full-Stack Developer
- Studio: CoskunTech — independent systems studio
- Location: Turkey + DACH region
- Languages: Turkish, English, German
- Website: https://abdullahvcoskun.dev
- Email: info@abdullahvcoskun.dev
- GitHub: https://github.com/AbdullahVC

## What I Build
- AI Workflows & Agent Systems
- Workflow Automation (n8n, custom pipelines)
- Internal Tools & Admin Panels
- API Integrations & Orchestration
- Operational Dashboards & Monitoring
- Full-Stack Web Products (Next.js, TypeScript)

## Tech Stack
- Frontend: Next.js, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
- Backend: Node.js, Python, Supabase, PostgreSQL
- AI/ML: OpenAI, Anthropic Claude, LangChain, pgvector
- Automation: n8n, custom workflow engines
- DevOps: Vercel, Docker, GitHub Actions

## Services
Available for freelance projects, technical consulting, and long-term collaboration.
Focus areas: AI-powered automation, internal tooling, and operational systems for SMBs in Turkey and the DACH region.
